script.name: lib.cycrow.table.columns
script.sourceplaintext:
$length.table = table alloc $right.table = table alloc $name.table = table alloc $sort.table = table alloc
$length.table['obj.name'] = 240 $length.table['obj.sector'] = 150 $length.table['obj.idcode'] = 60 $length.table['obj.shield'] = 50 $length.table['obj.class'] = 60 $length.table['obj.cargo'] = 60 $length.table['ship.command'] = 150 $length.table['ship.logisitics.job'] = 150 $length.table['ship.logisitics.status'] = 100 $length.table['station.logistics.import'] = 190 $length.table['station.logistics.export'] = 190 $length.table['station.logistics.prio'] = 60 $length.table['ware.name'] = 200 $length.table['station.warebar'] = 110 $length.table['ware.vol'] = 30 $length.table['ware.tc'] = 30 $length.table['ware.avgprice'] = 60
$length.table['station.logistics.minstorage'] = 100 $length.table['station.logistics.maxstorage'] = 100 $length.table['guilds.task.name'] = 300 $length.table['guilds.task.guild'] = 150
$right.table['obj.name'] = [FALSE] $right.table['obj.sector'] = [FALSE] $right.table['obj.idcode'] = [TRUE] $right.table['obj.shield'] = [TRUE] $right.table['obj.class'] = [TRUE] $right.table['obj.cargo'] = [TRUE] $right.table['ship.command'] = [FALSE] $right.table['ship.logisitics.job'] = [FALSE] $right.table['ship.logisitics.status'] = [FALSE] $right.table['station.logistics.import'] = [FALSE] $right.table['station.logistics.export'] = [FALSE] $right.table['station.logistics.prio'] = [FALSE] $right.table['ware.name'] = [FALSE] $right.table['station.warebar'] = [FALSE] $right.table['ware.tc'] = [TRUE] $right.table['ware.vol'] = [TRUE] $right.table['ware.avgprice'] = [TRUE] $right.table['station.logistics.minstorage'] = [TRUE] $right.table['station.logistics.maxstorage'] = [TRUE] $right.table['guilds.task.name'] = [FALSE] $right.table['guilds.task.guild'] = [FALSE]
$sort.table['obj.name'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['obj.sector'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['obj.idcode'] = [FALSE] $sort.table['obj.shield'] = [FALSE] $sort.table['obj.class'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['obj.cargo'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ship.command'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ship.logisitics.job'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ship.logisitics.status'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.logistics.import'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.logistics.export'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.logistics.prio'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ware.name'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.warebar'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ware.tc'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ware.vol'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['ware.avgprice'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.logistics.minstorage'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['station.logistics.maxstorage'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['guilds.task.name'] = [TRUE] $sort.table['guilds.task.guild'] = [TRUE]
$text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=4017 $name.table['obj.name'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9301 $name.table['obj.sector'] = $text $name.table['obj.idcode'] = ' ' $name.table['obj.shield'] = ' ' $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9303 $name.table['obj.class'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9212 $name.table['obj.cargo'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104500 $name.table['ship.command'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Encyclopedia] id=4 $name.table['ware.name'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104523 $name.table['station.warebar'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102519 $name.table['ware.tc'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102518 $name.table['ware.vol'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9510 $name.table['ware.avgprice'] = $text
$guilds.page = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' if $guilds.page $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=4228 $name.table['ship.logisitics.job'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=4229 $name.table['ship.logisitics.status'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=4209 $name.table['station.logistics.import'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=4210 $name.table['station.logistics.export'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=4203 $name.table['station.logistics.prio'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104462 $name.table['station.logistics.minstorage'] = $text $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104524 $name.table['station.logistics.maxstorage'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=160 $name.table['guilds.task.name'] = $text $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=117 $name.table['guilds.task.guild'] = $text else $name.table['ship.logisitics.job'] = ' ' $name.table['ship.logisitics.status'] = ' ' $name.table['station.logistics.import'] = ' ' $name.table['station.logistics.export'] = ' ' $name.table['station.logistics.prio'] = ' ' $name.table['station.logistics.minstorage'] = ' ' $name.table['station.logistics.maxstorage'] = ' ' $name.table['guilds.task.name'] = ' ' end
$ret = create new array, arguments=$name.table, $length.table, $right.table, $sort.table, null return $ret
